Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-12725 affecting package dnsmasq for versions less than 2.93-1
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-12725 affecting package dnsmasq for versions less than 2.93-1. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.

Criterion.Comment: Package dnsmasq is earlier than 2.93-1, affected by CVE-2026-12725
